title: ortgiesia gracilis
intro: Ortgiesia gracilis, also known as the lesser grass-leaved orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Ortgiesia gracilis include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Ortgiesia gracilis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
